name: Mrs. Zombie
description: Mrs. Zombie is an exciting arcade game that combines quick reflexes with strategic gameplay. Set in a spooky, eerie environment, players must slice through hordes of zombies before they reach the ground. Each zombie type presents unique challenges, making every level a thrilling experience.
